allowed_integration_contracts.purpose: catalog and workforce published API consumption
public and reference map layer discovery
consumer cache invalidation and read-model refresh

forbidden_integration_contracts.reason: Platform Core database is not a Gongzzang runtime contract; Gongzzang must use published HTTP, event, or immutable artifact contracts only
Listing price, status, exposure, filter, and detail semantics remain Gongzzang-owned
Catalog canonical writes move to Platform Core through ADR 0034
Marker position must come from Platform Core PNU anchors
